Hi Murielle, is this a good time? What is happening over there?
It is busy! Right now the finance team is presenting the quarterly results, and I am taking notes.
You usually lead those meetings, right? So what are you working on this week?
Two managers and I have been reviewing the hiring plan all week. We are clearing the backlog of open roles.
Are you hiring a lot of people this quarter?
No, we are not hiring right now. We are training the managers we have.
Good plan. Is the project still on track for the deadline?
Yes, it is on track. We have been catching up since Monday, so we are not behind schedule. I am sending you an update now.

Hi Murielle, it's Liam. I'm calling from the office, and honestly it's one of those mornings. Normally Tuesdays are quiet, but right now everything is happening at once. In the big meeting room, the finance team is presenting the quarterly results. Sofia is updating the slides while Daniel is taking notes. I've been reviewing the new hiring plan since eight o'clock, and I still haven't finished. Two managers are working through the backlog of open positions at the back of the room. Our main project is still ongoing, but the good news is that it's on track. We're not behind schedule, and we should hit the deadline. I've been trying to catch up on my emails all morning, but the phones keep ringing. I'm sending you a short update right now. Talk soon.

Good morning, everyone. I'd like to give you a quick update on what's happening this week. At the moment, we're reviewing the new onboarding process, and the team has been making really good progress. We usually hire two or three people every quarter, but right now we're not hiring. Instead, we're training the managers we already have. The system change is still ongoing, so a few reports are running slowly today, and we've been working through a small backlog. Please be patient. I've been talking to the operations team all week, and everything is still on track for the deadline. I know some of you are trying to catch up after the holiday, so take your time. Thank you, and have a productive day.
